patterns: Pattern: VERSIONED MIGRATIONS — JornalFlow uses a MIGRATIONS[] array with {version, up: SQL_STRING}. applyMigrations() tracks via _migrations table. New tables go as new version entries (currently at v2). EscalaFlow uses a different pattern (DDL blocks + idempotent addColumnIfMissing), but JornalFlow's is simpler and should be kept.

Pattern: DB SINGLETON — JornalFlow's database.ts uses PGlite with NO extensions (no vector, no pg_trgm). EscalaFlow's pglite.ts uses PGlite.create() with {extensions: {vector, pg_trgm}} and CREATE EXTENSION. JornalFlow's database.ts needs to be upgraded to match.

Pattern: QUERY HELPERS — JornalFlow has queryAll, queryOne, execute, transaction. EscalaFlow adds insertReturningId (INSERT...RETURNING id with positional params) and execDDL. JornalFlow needs insertReturningId added.

Pattern: IPC ROUTER — tipc with t.procedure.input<Type>().action() pattern. Router is a flat object with dotted keys. IA handlers: 'ia.chat', 'ia.set_api_key', 'ia.get_api_key'. New IA handlers follow same pattern.
Pattern: RENDERER SERVICES — Thin IPC wrappers in src/renderer/src/servicos/*.ts. No business logic. Call client['route.name']({input}) and return.

Pattern: SHARED TYPES — All domain types in src/shared/types.ts. Both processes import via @shared/types. IaMensagem already exists but is minimal (role: 'user'|'assistant'|'system', content, tool_calls?, criado_em).
Pattern: ZUSTAND STORES — iaStore has messages[], open, loading with simple setters. No persistence. Will need expansion for conversations, streaming state, context tracking.

Pattern: TESTS — vitest with real PGlite (no mocks). Each suite: beforeAll(getDb + applyMigrations + seed), afterAll(closeDb). Tools tested by calling .execute() directly with mockOptions {toolCallId, messages, abortSignal}.
Pattern: AI SDK USAGE — JornalFlow uses ai@6.0.116 with generateText, stepCountIs. EscalaFlow uses both generateText and streamText from same SDK, plus generateObject for structured extraction.
Pattern: EXTERNALIZE DEPS — electron.vite.config.ts uses externalizeDepsPlugin() for main process. New npm deps (openrouter, huggingface) will be externalized automatically.

Pattern: MAIN INDEX BOOTSTRAP — index.ts loads .env.local, sets API key from env, ensures data dirs, initializes DB, applies migrations, seeds, then creates window. New init steps (e.g., loading IA config from DB) go here.

Pattern: TOOL OUTPUT — Current JornalFlow tools return {found: true/false, ...data} or {success: true/false, error?}. EscalaFlow uses 3-status pattern: {status: 'ok'|'vazio'|'erro', summary, data, _meta}. Migration to 3-status is explicit in PRD.

ia_config.state: Hardcoded Gemini only. In-memory apiKey variable. No DB persistence. No multi-provider. getModel() returns gemini-3-flash-preview fixed.
ia_config.gap: Need: DB-backed config (configuracao_ia table), factory pattern for Gemini/OpenRouter/Local, resolveModel(), resolveProviderApiKey(), buildModelFactory() — all from EscalaFlow.

ia_cliente.state: Single chat() function using generateText(). Returns plain text string. No streaming. No follow-up. No tool result handling. No history management.
ia_cliente.gap: Need: iaEnviarMensagem + iaEnviarMensagemStream matching EscalaFlow's ~750-line cliente.ts. BrowserWindow broadcast for streaming. Follow-up pattern. Tool result truncation. History compaction integration.

ia_tools.state: 15 tools with basic CRUD patterns. Return mixed formats ({found:bool}, {success:bool}). No tool result truncation. No 3-status pattern.
ia_tools.gap: Need: Migrate existing 15 tools to 3-status pattern. Add ~10 new tools (buscar_conhecimento, sugerir_produtos, diagnosticar_jornal, etc.). Discovery design (entry tools -> detail tools).

ia_prompt.state: Bare-bones static prompt. Just describes basic capabilities and rules. 17 lines total.
ia_prompt.gap: Need: Rich 9-section system prompt like EscalaFlow's (477 lines). Domain knowledge (secoes, layout rules, naming patterns). Tool usage guide. Schema reference. Workflow recipes. Formatting rules.

database.state: PGlite with NO extensions. Constructor: new PGlite(dataDir). In-memory for tests. 10 tables, 2 migration versions.
database.gap: Need: PGlite.create() with vector + pg_trgm extensions. 6+ new tables: configuracao_ia, ia_conversas, ia_mensagens, ia_memorias, knowledge_sources, knowledge_chunks, knowledge_entities, knowledge_relations. Migration v3+.

frontend.state: IaPagina.tsx is a full-page chat. IaChatPanel.tsx is a sidebar panel. Both use iaStore (Zustand) which holds messages in-memory only. No conversation persistence. No streaming UI. No context awareness. ConfiguracoesPagina has single Gemini API key input.
frontend.gap: Phase 1 frontend: streaming text display, tool call indicators. Settings: multi-provider UI with provider selector, per-provider API key/model fields. Later: conversation list, knowledge management UI.

findings.approach: Port in 6 phases matching PRD. Phase 1 (Infra Base): upgrade database.ts with PGlite extensions, add new tables via migration v3, create config.ts with multi-provider factory, create cliente.ts with streaming+follow-up, update tipc.ts with new IA handlers, update frontend with streaming support and multi-provider settings. Phase 2 (Discovery): create discovery.ts with buildContextBriefing adapted for products/jornais domain. Phase 3 (Knowledge): copy+adapt knowledge/ layer from EscalaFlow (embeddings, chunking, ingest, search). Phase 4 (Memory): create session-processor.ts with extractMemories and maybeCompact. Phase 5 (Knowledge Graph): copy+adapt graph.ts. Phase 6 (Tools V2): migrate existing 15 tools to 3-status, add new tools.
risks: CRITICAL: PGlite vector extension — JornalFlow currently uses basic PGlite constructor (new PGlite(dataDir)). EscalaFlow uses PGlite.create({extensions: {vector, pg_trgm}}). The database.ts initialization MUST change. Both projects use @electric-sql/pglite@0.3.x so vector extension should be available, but import paths need updating.

CRITICAL: Migration compatibility — Existing users have v1+v2 tables. New v3 migration must be additive (new tables, not altering existing). PGlite vector extension must be enabled BEFORE creating tables with vector(768) columns.
HIGH: @openrouter/ai-sdk-provider is alpha (^6.0.0-alpha.1 in EscalaFlow). May have API instability. Need graceful fallback.

HIGH: @huggingface/transformers for offline embeddings — ~150-440MB model download. Need graceful degradation if model unavailable. resolveModelPath() needs adaptation for JornalFlow's directory structure.

MEDIUM: Frontend breaking changes — PRD says 'zero breaking changes on frontend' but streaming replaces the request-response pattern. The ia.chat IPC handler must remain backward-compatible while adding ia.stream and ia.sessao.* handlers.
MEDIUM: Test infrastructure — Current tests use basic PGlite without extensions. Tests for knowledge layer need PGlite with vector+pg_trgm, which may require updating the test DB setup.
LOW: Bundle size — @huggingface/transformers and ONNX runtime are heavy. May impact build times and app size significantly.

LOW: EscalaFlow's query.ts uses positional params (?) while JornalFlow uses $1/$2 style. The knowledge layer SQL from EscalaFlow already uses $1 style for some queries — need to verify all queries use JornalFlow's convention.

new_optional: @ai-sdk/devtools@^0.0.15 (AI SDK dev tools viewer — devDependency only)

modify.reason: Add PGlite.create() with vector+pg_trgm extensions, add CREATE EXTENSION statements
Add migration v3 with 6+ new tables: configuracao_ia, ia_conversas, ia_mensagens, ia_memorias, knowledge_sources, knowledge_chunks, knowledge_entities, knowledge_relations
Replace with multi-provider factory (Gemini+OpenRouter). DB-backed config. resolveModel, resolveProviderApiKey, buildModelFactory
Replace with full streaming+follow-up client. iaEnviarMensagem + iaEnviarMensagemStream + iaTestarConexao. BrowserWindow broadcast. Tool result truncation.
Expand from 17 to ~200+ lines. Domain-specific system prompt with 9 sections adapted from EscalaFlow pattern.
Migrate 15 existing tools to 3-status pattern. Add new tools.
Add ~15 new IA handlers: ia.stream, ia.config.*, ia.sessao.*, ia.conversas.*, ia.memorias.*, ia.knowledge.*
Update bootstrap: load IA config from DB instead of env-only, register IPC streaming listeners
Add types: IaConfiguracao, IaConversa, IaMensagemDB, IaContexto, IaAnexo, IaStreamEvent, ToolCall, KnowledgeSource, KnowledgeChunk, KnowledgeEntity, KnowledgeRelation
Expand: conversation management, streaming state, context tracking, persistent conversations
Add streaming IPC listener, conversation CRUD, config management
Add streaming text display, tool call indicators, conversation sidebar
Multi-provider settings UI: provider selector, per-provider API key/model fields, test connection per provider

create.reason: Auto-discovery context briefing for system prompt injection. Adapted from EscalaFlow: resumo global (produtos, jornais), jornal em foco, alertas proativos, auto-RAG, page hints.
Memory extraction (extractMemories) + history compaction (maybeCompact). Port from EscalaFlow.
Offline embeddings via @huggingface/transformers. Port from EscalaFlow. generateQueryEmbedding, generatePassageEmbedding, generatePassageEmbeddings.
Recursive text splitter. Direct port from EscalaFlow (domain-agnostic).
Ingestion pipeline: source -> chunk -> embed -> FTS. Port from EscalaFlow.
Hybrid search: 70% vector + 30% FTS + trigram. Port from EscalaFlow.
Knowledge graph: entity extraction, graph traversal, graph enrichment. Port from EscalaFlow.
Seed knowledge base with domain content: secoes, layout rules, naming patterns.
Tests for multi-provider config, resolveModel, resolveProviderApiKey
Tests for chat message building, tool call extraction, follow-up logic
Tests for hybrid search (may need PGlite with vector extension)

discovery_adaptation.resumo_global: Count of produtos_ativos, produtos_com_imagem, total_imagens, total_jornais, jornais_rascunho
discovery_adaptation.jornal_em_foco: If rota contains editor or jornal_id: load jornal details, secoes, item counts, import stats
discovery_adaptation.alertas_proativos: Produtos sem imagem, secoes vazias, jornal com itens fallback, precos zerados
discovery_adaptation.auto_rag: Same pattern — busca conhecimento relevante a partir da mensagem do usuario
discovery_adaptation.memorias: Same pattern — fatos sobre o supermercado, preferencias de layout
discovery_adaptation.dica_pagina: Map JornalFlow routes: dashboard, produtos, editor, historico, galeria, configuracoes, ia

system_prompt_sections: 2. Dominio (secoes do jornal, categorias de produtos, fluxo de importacao)
3. Schema de referencia (tabelas e campos relevantes)
4. Tools guide (quando usar cada tool, discovery design)
5. Workflows comuns (importar planilha, revisar jornal, buscar produto, trocar imagem)
7. Memorias e Conhecimento (quando salvar, quando buscar)
8. Contexto automatico (o que o discovery injeta)
escalaflow_adaptation_notes.query_param_style: JornalFlow uses $1, $2 parameterized queries. EscalaFlow's query.ts converts ? to $1 internally. Knowledge layer SQL from EscalaFlow already uses $1 style in some places but ? in others — MUST normalize to $1 for JornalFlow.

phase_1_infra.notes: Core infrastructure. database.ts upgrade is the riskiest part. Must maintain backward compat with existing data.

phase_2_discovery.notes: Mostly SQL queries adapted to JornalFlow schema. Less complex than EscalaFlow's (fewer entities).

phase_3_knowledge.notes: Near-direct port. chunking.ts is domain-agnostic. embeddings.ts needs path adaptation. search.ts and ingest.ts need $1 param normalization.

phase_4_memory.notes: Direct port. extractMemories + maybeCompact. Depends on Phase 3 for embeddings.

phase_5_graph.notes: Near-direct port. Entity extraction prompt needs domain adaptation (produtos, secoes, categorias).

phase_6_tools_v2.notes: Refactor 15 existing tools + add ~10 new. 3-status pattern is formulaic once established.
